text:
# Welcome!

Hey, <@__USER_ID__>! Welcome to Francesca Hong's Volunteer Workspace! We are really glad you are here. The trickiest part of getting involved is finding out where to start -- here are some resources for doing that!

In the canvas attached to the https://testworkspace-ozj2603.slack.com/archives/C0B2HTBB0E7 channel, you can find the _*Volunteer Handbook*_, which includes:

* an overview of our slack channels
* who our staff and volunteer leadership is, and  
* our community code of conduct that you are be expected to adhere to.

if you have any questions, please feel free to reach out to:

<@U0APZQNV1B8>
<@U0B7Q9FLXT6>
